case_title: SUSAN ENTEEN VS. BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN STREIFFER INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION AND BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ENTEEN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN STREIFFER INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION AND BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY ENTEEN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN STREIFFER INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION AND BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENTEEN, SUSAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIAN STREIFFER INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION AND BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES ARE RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIAN STREIFFER INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION AND BRIAN STREIFFER CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2008 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PARTIES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK; S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
